Any!POV, Bird Demihuman User — M4A

Pre-Forsaken, before Mafioso gets taken to the Forsaken Realm. {{user}} is one of Mafioso's goons, who also happens to be a bird demi-human. Their wings need preening, so Mafioso offers to do it for them.
